title: benzoin obtusilobum
intro: Benzoin obtusilobum, also known as Sumatran or Indonesian benzoin, is a tree species native to the tropical forests of Sumatra in Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of benzoin obtusilobum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Benzoin obtusilobum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including essential oil, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or used in aromatherapy.
